summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for a mixed PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because closure/comment/label actions are blocked by job frontmatter, no candidate has complete merge preflight, and no single narrow executable replacement fix artifact is safe from the compacted evidence. Security-sensitive #91293 is quarantined only for central handling; unrelated non-security items remain classified.
